title: Samhita Acacia Wood Mortar and Pestle for Garlic Pepper Herb Crusher Kitchen Utensils Birthday Housewarming Gift. Mortar- 4" x 3" Pestle- 5.5"
description:
About this item
Perfectly designed efo Pestle Mortar Set is great for grinding whole spices into a powder, also good for making small batches of puréed garlic, ginger, and other ingredients.
The traditional design is perfect for just about any type of mashing in the kitchen
Mortar and pestle set can easily crush garlic, ginger, vanilla, pepper and various spices
when you add them to cooking, you can get the best taste. The mortar pestle not only grinds food, it also grinds supplements, herbs and pills.
We recommend not to wash this product with water. To clean, wipe with damp fabric and towel dry, To preserve the beauty of the Acacia wood, periodically apply oil with a fabric or towel and let dry long. Mortar- 4" x 3" Pestle- 5.5"
reviews_5s: I bought another one before just two made out of slits of bamboo and they came apart when I made the meal. This one looks fantastic and is very well done and very well made it's not going to fall apart on you. So I suggest don't get that other one that's made out of bamboo because their little slits of bamboo and or made out of pieces of bamboo put together and with the heat or with the matching of whatever you're mashing inside there it starts to separate and it's really quite a mess. But this one this one is good buy itBuena calidadThis was less expensive than Wal-Mart and so much better quality! I love this! It is perfect for what I needed it for! Thank you!I lost my bamboo mortar and pestle in a fire, and have been looking for a small, sturdy replacement. This one is perfect. I use it regularly to make popcorn salt, which is just more finely ground table salt, and occasionally to crush seeds like cumin. Easily cleaned with a quick rinse. BONUS: The wood is beautiful, more so then what is pictured.Many reviews state that this product is too small. I suppose that depends on your needs. In my opinion, it's just the right size for someone just starting out in their 'homestead journey'. I use this for crushing herbs from my garden. It works great to get them to the size needed for storing. If you are processing extremely large medicinals, then you'll probably need a larger mortar and pestle.Extra nice wood, small handle easy to use. I love it so much!Well use this soon, so far it color looks good, I believe once it is regularly it will that broken in look, I just like the weight of the pestleFor the price I am very pleased with this purchase. It is a good size and well made. Looks lovely on my counter.This is so beautiful I felt guilty sticking it in the cupboard, it deserves to be displayed.....With this price we could not expect more from a wooden product.
reviews_1s:
This product must be all glued together because after 2 months it split down the side with an 1/8” gap. Then a 2nd split in the wood started. This is a piece of junkI purchase this bowl and postal to use for grind ing herbs. I was excited to start using it so I washed it so I can use a clean bowl obly to discovered is came apart. Money waisted and unable to use. Not happy with this product.I did not have a chanse to use it, after I hand washed and let it to dry in the photo is what I found second day !!!Used one time, washed and dried it and put it on the shelf. Next time I looked at it I noticed that the lacquer finish was completely gone (lord knows how much ended up in my meal) and there was a large crack down the side that you could actually see through. Absolute junk.A crack appeared down the side of the mortar after the second use! It was a natural line that exited in the wood. It simply opened. I'm very disappointed.So I bought this cause I needed to make a paste. And it cracked the same day. I was so upset.Unused, it is cracked, don't buy itPlay Video
Cracked before I ever used it .. while washing I seen the whole side had a crack in itI used the mortar and pestle one time and the wood split on the sideI used it once and the glue joint cracked.
